g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the HTML shell contain?')
sendPrompt('What do the JS modules do at runtime?')
sendPrompt('How is Leaflet used in the browser?')
sendPrompt('How is CSS structured for the platform?')
sendPrompt('How is the CSV data file served from Amplify?')
sendPrompt('How are GeoJSON boundary files served?')
sendPrompt('What GADM files are hosted on Amplify?')
sendPrompt('How does Amplify CDN serve static assets?')
sendPrompt('What GEE collections are used for data extraction?')
sendPrompt('How does the GEE Python API work?')
sendPrompt('How does GEE batch export to Google Drive?')
sendPrompt('What land cover classification does GEE use?')
sendPrompt('How does GitHub Actions deploy to Amplify?')
sendPrompt('How is the source code structured in GitHub?')
sendPrompt('How do OpenStreetMap tiles load in Leaflet?')
sendPrompt('What is the CDN strategy for map tiles?')

svg.text: Milestone 2: automated GEE → Cloud Function → Amplify pipeline
dashed lines = manual / planned; solid = active connections
